description: Workflow for validating, enriching, and applying side effects to pet entities
name: pet_processing_workflow

transitions.description: Validate pet entity fields and set defaults if missing
transitions.name: validate_pet

transitions.description: Enrich pet entity with default description if missing
transitions.end_state_description: Pet entity has been enriched with description
transitions.name: enrich_pet

transitions.description: Perform asynchronous side effects such as notifications
transitions.end_state_description: Pet entity has completed side effects and processing
transitions.name: apply_side_effects
transitions.start_state_description: Pet entity has been enriched with description
